questions.question: Which restaurants in San Francisco Ca are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Restaurants in San Francisco Ca with weekend hours include: Nomad Cafe (Sat: 07:00-17:00), Hawking Bird (Sat: 11:30-22:00), Burma Superstar (Sat: 11:30-22:00), Bakesale Betty's (Sat: 11:00-14:00), Pizzaiolo (Sat: 16:00-21:00), True Burger (Sat: 11:00-21:00), Mua Lounge (Sat: 16:30-02:00), Shaan Indian Cuisine (Sat: 17:00-21:00) and 361 more. 369 total with weekend availability.
